lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real LLM-driven rework; scenarios drive the evaluator + SST-loader proofs.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': the dormancy worthiness decision now flows through the resurface_evaluate scenario; TestBridgeResurfaceEvaluator_* prove the LLM-driven path (parse, routing, public-signal forwarding, internal-field non-leak, error paths) with a scripted bridge; the SST loader tests prove fail-loud operational bounds.

scenarios.title: Resurfacing-worthiness judgment routes to the LLM scenario, parses the decision, and never leaks internal fields
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: EvaluateResurface routes IntentEnvelope{ScenarioID: resurface_evaluate}, forwards {title,days_dormant,relevance_score,access_count}, omits ArtifactID (json:"-"), parses {worth_resurfacing,confidence,reason}, and errors on nil runner / nil result / non-OK / empty final / bad JSON.

scenarios.title: Pure helper: the operational confidence-floor gate
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: resurfaceShouldSurface is true only when worth_resurfacing AND confidence >= floor.

scenarios.title: Operational resurfacing bounds are fail-loud SST config
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Missing/empty INTELLIGENCE_RESURFACE_* keys fail loud naming the var; out-of-range values (min_dormancy_days<=0, cap<=0, floor not in [0,1]) are rejected.
